title: Defence minister candidate says 'safe sky' is priority
summary_full: Prime Minister Evika Siliņa has approached Colonel Raivis Melnis about the position of defence minister. Melnis said in a press briefing after meeting with PM Siliņa on Tuesday that his priority was anti-drone defence capabilities, drawing on the Ukrainian experience.
